lines.english: Lesson 19
lines.chinese: 第19课
lines.raw: Lesson 19 | 第19课

lines.english: A very dear cat
lines.chinese: 一只非常名贵的猫
lines.raw: A very dear cat | 一只非常名贵的猫

lines.english: Why was Rastus 'very dear' in more ways than one?
lines.chinese: 为什么拉斯特斯是一只多方面都“非常名贵”的猫？
lines.raw: Why was Rastus 'very dear' in more ways than one? | 为什么拉斯特斯是一只多方面都“非常名贵”的猫？

lines.english: Kidnappers are rarely interested in animals, but they recently took considerable interest in Mrs. Eleanor Ramsay's cat.
lines.chinese: 绑架者极少对动物感兴趣，但他们最近却对埃莉诺·拉姆齐夫人的猫产生了极大兴趣。
lines.raw: Kidnappers are rarely interested in animals, but they recently took considerable interest in Mrs. Eleanor Ramsay's cat. | 绑架者极少对动物感兴趣，但他们最近却对埃莉诺·拉姆齐夫人的猫产生了极大兴趣。

lines.english: Mrs. Eleanor Ramsay, a very wealthy old lady, has shared a flat with her cat, Rastus, for a great many years.
lines.chinese: 埃莉诺·拉姆齐夫人，一位非常富有的老太太，与她的猫拉斯特斯共同住在一个公寓里已经很多年了。
lines.raw: Mrs. Eleanor Ramsay, a very wealthy old lady, has shared a flat with her cat, Rastus, for a great many years. | 埃莉诺·拉姆齐夫人，一位非常富有的老太太，与她的猫拉斯特斯共同住在一个公寓里已经很多年了。

lines.english: Rastus leads an orderly life.
lines.chinese: 拉斯特斯过着有规律的生活。
lines.raw: Rastus leads an orderly life. | 拉斯特斯过着有规律的生活。

lines.english: He usually takes a short walk in the evenings and is always home by seven o'clock.
lines.chinese: 它通常在傍晚散步一小会儿，总是在7点钟前到家。
lines.raw: He usually takes a short walk in the evenings and is always home by seven o'clock. | 它通常在傍晚散步一小会儿，总是在7点钟前到家。

lines.english: One evening, however he failed to arrive.
lines.chinese: 然而，一天晚上，它没有回来。
lines.raw: One evening, however he failed to arrive. | 然而，一天晚上，它没有回来。

lines.english: Mrs. Ramsay got very worried.
lines.chinese: 拉姆齐夫人非常焦急。
lines.raw: Mrs. Ramsay got very worried. | 拉姆齐夫人非常焦急。

lines.english: She looked everywhere for him but could not find him.
lines.chinese: 她到处寻找，但没有找到它。
lines.raw: She looked everywhere for him but could not find him. | 她到处寻找，但没有找到它。

lines.english: Three days after Rastus' disappearance, Mrs. Ramsay received an anonymous letter.
lines.chinese: 拉斯特斯失踪3天后，拉姆齐夫人收到一封匿名信。
lines.raw: Three days after Rastus' disappearance, Mrs. Ramsay received an anonymous letter. | 拉斯特斯失踪3天后，拉姆齐夫人收到一封匿名信。

lines.english: The writer stated that Rastus was in safe hands and would be returned immediately if Mrs. Ramsay paid a ransom of ￡1, 000.
lines.chinese: 写信人称拉斯特斯很安全，如果拉姆齐夫人支付1000英镑赎金，它将立即被送回。
lines.raw: The writer stated that Rastus was in safe hands and would be returned immediately if Mrs. Ramsay paid a ransom of ￡1, 000. | 写信人称拉斯特斯很安全，如果拉姆齐夫人支付1000英镑赎金，它将立即被送回。

lines.english: Mrs.Ramsay was instructed to place the money in a cardboard box and to leave it outside her door.
lines.chinese: 拉姆齐夫人被指示将钱放进一个纸箱，并将其放在门外。
lines.raw: Mrs.Ramsay was instructed to place the money in a cardboard box and to leave it outside her door. | 拉姆齐夫人被指示将钱放进一个纸箱，并将其放在门外。

lines.english: At first, she decided to go to the police,
lines.chinese: 最初，她决定报警，
lines.raw: At first, she decided to go to the police, | 最初，她决定报警，

lines.english: but fearing that she would never see Rastus again--the letter had made that quite clear--she changed her mind.
lines.chinese: 但由于担心再也见不到拉斯特斯——信中已把这一点说得一清二楚——她改变了主意。
lines.raw: but fearing that she would never see Rastus again--the letter had made that quite clear--she changed her mind. | 但由于担心再也见不到拉斯特斯——信中已把这一点说得一清二楚——她改变了主意。

lines.english: She withdrew ￡1000 from her bank and followed the kidnapper's instructions.
lines.chinese: 她从银行取出1000英镑，按照绑架者的指示做了。
lines.raw: She withdrew ￡1000 from her bank and followed the kidnapper's instructions. | 她从银行取出1000英镑，按照绑架者的指示做了。

lines.english: The next morning, the box had disappeared but Mrs.Ramsay was sure that the kidnapper would keep his word.
lines.chinese: 第二天早上，箱子不见了，但拉姆齐夫人确信绑架者会遵守诺言。
lines.raw: The next morning, the box had disappeared but Mrs.Ramsay was sure that the kidnapper would keep his word. | 第二天早上，箱子不见了，但拉姆齐夫人确信绑架者会遵守诺言。

lines.english: Sure enough, Rastus arrived punctually at seven o'clock that evening.
lines.chinese: 果不其然，拉斯特斯那天晚上7点准时回来了。
lines.raw: Sure enough, Rastus arrived punctually at seven o'clock that evening. | 果不其然，拉斯特斯那天晚上7点准时回来了。

lines.english: He looked very well, though he was rather thirsty, for he drank half a bottle of milk.
lines.chinese: 它看上去很好，只是有点渴，喝了半瓶牛奶。
lines.raw: He looked very well, though he was rather thirsty, for he drank half a bottle of milk. | 它看上去很好，只是有点渴，喝了半瓶牛奶。

lines.english: The police were astounded when Mrs. Ramsay told them what she had done.
lines.chinese: 当拉姆齐夫人告诉警察她所做的一切时，警察都惊呆了。
lines.raw: The police were astounded when Mrs. Ramsay told them what she had done. | 当拉姆齐夫人告诉警察她所做的一切时，警察都惊呆了。

lines.english: She explained that Rastus was very dear to her.
lines.chinese: 她解释说拉斯特斯对她来说非常宝贵。
lines.raw: She explained that Rastus was very dear to her. | 她解释说拉斯特斯对她来说非常宝贵。

lines.english: Considering the amount she paid, he was dear in more ways than one!
lines.chinese: 考虑到她所支付的金额，它在多方面都确实很“名贵”！
lines.raw: Considering the amount she paid, he was dear in more ways than one! | 考虑到她所支付的金额，它在多方面都确实很“名贵”！
